content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Dr. Evil Underscores". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1285/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of strings. Then n lines follow, each containing a string s consisting of underscores and letters.
content.outputFormat: For each string, print the minimum number of operations required to make the string beautiful.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a greedy approach to count the minimum number of operations required to make the string beautiful.
